content: PDF resume and portfolio site are complementary, not either/or: PDF is ATS-optimized/static/two-page-constrained for applicant-tracking pipelines; portfolio site is for humans after resume clears the filter, always current, deep-linkable, searchable. Best practice: portfolio should have a visible 'Resume / CV (PDF)' download link/button, typically near contact info alongside LinkedIn/GitHub. Keep both in sync.
